topic: Apple Intelligence approved in China — integrating Alibaba Qwen and Baidu
prompt: A single monumental monolith of dark obsidian glass floating in a deep black void, two opposing energy auras wrapping around it, the left aura of cool silver-white light filaments flowing in smooth minimal curves, the right aura of warm crimson and gold crystalline facets, both auras converging at a brilliant white-hot core at center, dramatic dual rim lighting from opposing sides, low-angle 35mm cinematic editorial photography, shallow depth of field, no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks
alt_text: A dark obsidian orb floats in a black void — cool silver-white light swirls on one side, warm crimson-gold fire on the other, both converging at a brilliant central core.
